title.en: Of course, if you can't enter the Legendary Dao...

content.en:
True Legendary creatures are rare and rare, and killing a Legendary creature can only extract one Legendary Blood.

The major forces more or less have a little inventory, which can help a small number of Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm impact to the Legendary Dao Realm.

However, it is more difficult to take the path of the Ninefold Dao Realm, which is to take the path of the strongest to the Dao, and if you want to become a Legendary Dao Realm.

The Ancient Emperor of Longyan continued, "Ordinary Legendary Blood can only help ordinary Ninefold Dao Realm breakthroughs, but they can't help you break through. And if a breakthrough fails, a piece of legendary blood will be in vain. Especially the Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm of the few of you who have taken the path of the Supreme Legend, only the blood of the Supreme Legend can help them to impact the Legendary Dao Realm. Su Changsheng is slightly better, you only need to find the top-level legendary blood, and you can break through, but the premise is that you can repair the foundation, otherwise the hope of breaking through is still slim. "

Foundation!

Ye Tian had heard that the Immortal Emperor had not been able to break through, but the foundation had been damaged, and it seemed that the rumors were true.

The Legendary Realm is currently a place where there are many Legendary creatures, and even if you kill a batch of Legendary creatures, after a long time, you will continue to breed real Legendary creatures.

Therefore, the Innate Origin Domain Alliance and the Supreme Dao Void Demon have invested a lot of combat power in the Legendary Realm, and the top Nine Realms are fighting in it.

Of course, if you can't enter the Legendary Dao Realm, you will be excluded.

Ye Tian and the other five Ninefold Dao Realms were not afraid of danger, so they naturally wanted to enter the Legendary Realm.

Moreover, it was not the first time that the Immortal Emperor had entered, he had also entered the last time, and then he used a special method to come out and interfere with the invasion of the Dao Void Demon and keep the Blood River Fortress.

Otherwise, the Blood River Fortress is at risk of being breached.

After all, it is said that the Dao Realm and other Ninefold Dao Realms that have taken the path of the strongest Dao have agreements and are not allowed to participate in the war.

......

The Void, the Realm of Legends.

This place is located in a very distant area, far away from the Innate Origin Domain Alliance and the Supreme Dao Void Demon Territory.

The Ancient Emperor of Longyan came here with Ye Tian, Su Changsheng and the other Nine Realms to the Dao Realm.

Then.

Ye Tian saw a big ball of white light, this big ball of white light was too big, it was the Legendary Realm.

And around the White Light Sphere, there are garrisons in two areas.

On one side is the Supreme Dao Void Demon, a large number of fortresses have been built in that area, and the vaguely transmitted aura makes Ye Tian and them tremble, and there must be a very terrifying existence inhabited inside.

And on the side of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, a huge fortress has also been built, on which is home to a group of legendary Dao Realm, and even the existence of the Origin Origin Alliance at the level of the Patriarch.

Whoa!!!

Ye Tian came to this legendary fortress.

Longyan Ancient Emperor said: "This legendary-level fortress has long been home to sixty-six legendary Dao realms, and they are all top legendary Dao realms, and there are even many legendary Dao realms who have taken the road to the strongest Dao, and there are also two elders sitting in the town. After all, the Legendary Realm is too important, if we don't sit here, the Supreme Dao Void Demon occupies here, arranges a large array, blocks the surrounding void, and uses this place as a base camp, we will be in trouble!"

Ye Tian nodded, feeling very reasonable.

"You wait here for a while, and if the Legend Realm is most suitable to enter, I will send you in!" said the Ancient Emperor of Longyan.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly, and then waited silently in this legendary fortress.

......

After a while.

Ye Tian received a notice that it was time to enter the legendary realm.

Somewhere in the world of legends.

Suddenly, a finger poked in, directly piercing the barrier of the Legendary Realm.

"It's the patriarch who made a move!"

They are enlightened.

Only the patriarch has such strength, and the Longyan Ancient Emperor is definitely not good.

"Let's get in!"

Ye Tian and the others no longer hesitated, and directly entered the legendary realm.

Airplanes!!!

Among the legends.

Ye Tian and Su Changsheng both came in and landed on a sea of clouds.

Beneath the sea of clouds, they descended and came to an ancient giant city.

This giant city is the base built by the Innate Origin Alliance in the Legendary Realm, Ye Tian and they came to the gate of the city, and after inspection, they confirmed that their identities were correct, so they let Ye Tian and them enter.

After entering.

Ye Tiancai found that there are really many Ninefold Supreme Dao Realms here, and each of them is a weak Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm, all of them are very demonic Ninefold Supreme Dao Realms, even if they don't take the path of the Strongest Dao, but their own foundation is also comparable to the Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon of the top bloodline, and the fourth sequence of the Highest Dao rules have at least comprehended the ninety percent realm, otherwise coming to the Legend Realm will be sent to death.

Su Changsheng introduced Ye Tian: "Deacon Ye, this is a legendary ancient city, with a total of six hundred and eighty-six Ninefold Dao Realms, of course, most of the Ninefold Dao Realms are not here, and they are currently scattered all over the Legendary Realm, all preparing to kill Legendary-level creatures.

Legendary creatures are very difficult to kill, even the weakest legendary creatures are not something we can deal with, and it is normal to be killed in seconds once encountered. Therefore, almost always while the legendary creatures were fighting and getting injured, a group of Ninefold to Dao Realm combined formations killed a legendary-level creature together.

Therefore, you have to be patient in the world of legends and not be reckless, otherwise you will be looking for death. "

Ye Tian nodded slightly, the top-notch Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm was indeed the kind that was looking for death and being killed in seconds in front of the legendary-level creatures.

Even a Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm like Su Changsheng was a very weak existence in front of a true legendary-level creature.

Su Changsheng said again: "Because legendary-level creatures are difficult to kill, the Ninefold Dao Realm here is divided into various teams, Deacon Ye, you are the Ninefold Dao Realm who has taken the road of the strongest to the Dao, it is estimated that there will be many squads trying to win you over." A small team, if there is no Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm that has taken the path of the strongest to the Dao, there is no way to kill the legendary-level creatures. So, you're still popular in the legendary world!"

Suddenly.

Ye Tian asked, "Immortal Emperor, are there many items in the third sequence of the Legendary Realm?"

Su Changsheng nodded slightly: "Many, but most of them are low-quality third-order supreme rule items, and their value is not high." Almost every surviving Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm had the third sequence of Supreme Dao Rule items in their hands, but unfortunately they didn't dare to refine them, otherwise the price would be too great. I just refined an unknown third-order supreme rule item, which caused the foundation to be damaged, and I still can't break through! Now, I just want to get some more legendary blood, and then ask the patriarch to help me heal the foundation. "

When Ye Tian heard this, he was immediately overjoyed.

There are a lot of third-order supreme rule items here, which is a good thing for him!

"We have to find a way to trade the low-quality third-order Supreme Dao rule items from the other Nine Folds Supreme Dao Realm to their hands!"

Ye Tian muttered.
